'''dhabugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qorma|qorma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qorma|qorma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhabugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæbigith|dhæbigith]] || [[word:dhæbigij|dhæbigij]] || [[word:dhæbigish|dhæbigish]] || [[word:dhæbigi|dhæbigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhabubuguth|dhabubuguth]] || [[word:dhabubuguj|dhabubuguj]] || [[word:dhabubugush|dhabubugush]] || [[word:dhabubugu|dhabubugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhabuguth|dhabuguth]] || [[word:dhabuguj|dhabuguj]] || [[word:dhabugush|dhabugush]] || [[word:dhabugu|dhabugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhabufgufth|dhabufgufth]] || [[word:dhabufgufj|dhabufgufj]] || [[word:dhabufgufsh|dhabufgufsh]] || [[word:dhabufguf|dhabufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhabuguthu|dhabuguthu]] || [[word:dhabuguju|dhabuguju]] || [[word:dhabugushu|dhabugushu]] || [[word:dhabuguku|dhabuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhabuguth|dhabuguth]] || [[word:dhabuguj|dhabuguj]] || [[word:dhabugush|dhabugush]] || [[word:dhabugu|dhabugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhabuguthul|dhabuguthul]] || [[word:dhabugujul|dhabugujul]] || [[word:dhabugushul|dhabugushul]] || [[word:dhabugukul|dhabugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhabuguuthuthu|dhabuguuthuthu]] || [[word:dhabuguujuju|dhabuguujuju]] || [[word:dhabuguushushu|dhabuguushushu]] || [[word:dhabuguuku|dhabuguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhabuguthun|dhabuguthun]] || [[word:dhabugujun|dhabugujun]] || [[word:dhabugushun|dhabugushun]] || [[word:dhabugukun|dhabugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhabuguthuoro|dhabuguthuoro]] || [[word:dhabugujuoro|dhabugujuoro]] || [[word:dhabugushuoro|dhabugushuoro]] || [[word:dhabugukuoro|dhabugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
